metadata.description: Claude Code marketplace for Cairn — trust + reputation auto-rating

plugins.name: cairn
plugins.description: Trust + reputation auto-rating for sources, MCP servers, and tools. Rates every WebFetch/WebSearch/MCP/Bash-net call in the background. Default rater uses your claude.ai subscription (no extra $ charged — each rating draws from the same usage allowance as your normal Claude work, so heavy use can throttle other Claude work). Switch to ANTHROPIC_API_KEY for direct billing at ~$0.0003/rating. See https://cairnscore.ai/privacy.
